title: Tender Indulgent French Garlic Stir-fry with Passion Fruit and Dumplings
description: A Mediterranean-inspired dish featuring tender garlic stir-fried with passion fruit pulp and dumplings for a touch of indulgence.

ingredients.name: 1 lb dumplings
ingredients.amount: diced and cooked ahead of time

ingredients.name: 2 cups mixed vegetables (e.g., zucchini, eggplant, spinach)

instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat. Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant and golden.
Add passion fruit pulp and stir to combine with the garlic. Cook for about 2 minutes, allowing flavors to meld together.
Stir in diced dumplings, chopped parsley (if using), red bell pepper, and onions. Continue to cook for an additional 5-7 minutes until vegetables are tender but still slightly crisp.
Add mixed vegetables and stir well into the mixture. Cook for another 3-4 minutes or until all ingredients are heated through and well combined.
Serve hot as a side dish with grilled chicken or fish, or use as a filling in dumplings for an indulgent dinner option.
